# Factor or Numerical Covariate? {#factor-or-covariate}

```{r factor-or-covariate-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/factor-or-covariate-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/factor-or-covariate/"
)
```

```{r child-factor-or-covariate, child="../lecture-content/21-factor-or-covariate.Rmd"}
```
